description: Argon2id PHC verification — the cross-language interop test for password hashing. The fixture hash was generated with the spec floor parameters (m=19456, t=2, p=1) using argon2-cffi-derived libsodium-compatible Argon2id; any conforming verifier MUST accept it for the matching plaintext and reject it for any other.

tests.description: Verifying the fixture PHC hash against the original plaintext password MUST return true. This is THE cross-SDK Argon2id parity test — both Node and PHP MUST verify the same hash to the same plaintext.
Verifying the fixture PHC hash against a different plaintext MUST return false. Constant-time comparison; no fallback.
An empty candidate password verifies as false.
